target.routing_note: Two unrelated fj-lax random/bead commits landed after the profile and before this pass completed. They do not touch fj-ad or the value_and_grad benchmark implementation.

lever.name: pre-sized scalar fast-path slots
lever.summary: Pre-size the guarded scalar-F64 Add/Mul value_and_grad values vector from static Jaxpr counts, then use the grow/fallback helper only when VarIds are sparse or exceed the pre-sized dense range.

benchmark.score_basis: comparable local run pair from the same scratch worktree and target directory

baseline.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch-jizp8-baseline-e191c615 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-api --bench api_overhead -- value_and_grad_runtime/shared/deep_100_nodes
baseline.rch_mode: RCH selected vmi1153651, remote topology preflight failed, local fail-open

candidate.rch_mode: local direct confirmation after RCH selected vmi1227854 for the final rerun; remote-only candidate rows were not scored

diagnostic_remote_candidates_not_scored.reason_not_scored: No same-worker baseline row; local baseline was faster and incomparable.
No same-worker baseline row; used only to confirm the candidate builds and runs remotely.

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Equation traversal, reverse traversal, Add cotangent accumulation order, repeated-Mul cotangent order, and output/gradient order are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: The same scalar f64 + and * operations run in the same order. No reassociation, FMA, SIMD, mixed precision, or tolerance relaxation was introduced.
isomorphism_proof.fallback: Static count pre-sizing is only an allocation/layout choice. Sparse VarIds still grow through scalar_f64_ensure_slot, and VarIds requiring more than DENSE_AD_VALUE_STORE_MAX_SLOTS slots still return Ok(None) and fall back to the generic tape path.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG primitive or state is routed.
isomorphism_proof.edge_test: scalar_f64_add_mul_fast_path_falls_back_for_high_var_ids asserts that a VarId at DENSE_AD_VALUE_STORE_MAX_SLOTS returns Ok(None), not MissingVariable.

validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch-jizp8-test-e191c615 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-ad --lib
validation.result: passed via RCH local fail-open; 365 passed, 0 failed

validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch-jizp8-check-e191c615 rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-ad --all-targets
validation.result: passed via RCH local fail-open; pre-existing fj-trace unused-variable warning only

validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch-jizp8-clippy-e191c615 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-ad --all-targets -- -D warnings -A unused-variables -A clippy::too_many_arguments -A clippy::doc_lazy_continuation -A clippy::excessive_precision -A clippy::manual_is_multiple_of -A clippy::needless_range_loop -A clippy::useless_vec

validation.result: nonzero on broad pre-existing fj-ad inventory; rerun after replacing the new direct index with get_mut removed that new finding, and UBS fmt, clippy, cargo check, test build, cargo audit, and cargo deny sections were clean

next: Reprofile value_and_grad after landing; if fj-ad remains top, stop shrinking slot helpers and attack a larger primitive such as cached scalar fast-path metadata or a compiled scalar Add/Mul tape.
